step_rationale: Post-MI angiogenesis mediator; injury-response, not atherothrombotic.
mechanism: TWEAK mediates angiogenesis and neovascularization following myocardial infarction as part of the post-injury healing response.

references.title: The Immediate Impact of Infarct Size on the Systemic Inflammatory Response: IL-6 as Central Mediator Identified through Biomarker and Proteomic Profiling.
Proteogenomic Analysis of Coronary Artery Calcification in Human Populations.
Vascular proteomics and the discovery process of clinical biomarkers: The case of TWEAK.
